title: Custom Crosshair Mod
description: A Minecraft mod that allows you to style your crosshair. Design your perfect crosshair with custom size, colour and shape, dynamic animations, adaptive colours and more!
body:
# Custom Crosshair Mod

<sub>For Minecraft: 26.2 | 26.1.2 | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.6 | 1.20.1 | 1.19 | 1.18.2 | 1.18.1 | 1.17.1 | 1.17 | 1.16.5 | 1.16.4 | 1.16.3 | 1.16.2 | 1.16.1 | 1.15.2 | 1.14.4 | 1.12 | 1.11.2 | 1.10 | 1.9.4 | 1.8.9/1.8.8 | 1.7.10</sub>

[![https://www.bisecthosting.com/CustomCrosshairMod](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3e0a9ce1-7bd8-41f1-ace5-ed66a085a5c0.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/CustomCrosshairMod)

Visit [customcrosshairmod.com](https://customcrosshairmod.com) for more details!

Description:

This mod allow you to change the style of your crosshair.

- Size!
- Colour!
- Rainbow Crosshair!
- Shape!
- Dynamic! (Try using a bow or sword!)
- Adaptive Colour!
- Works on servers!
- Draw your own!

<sub>By default press the "GRAVE" key to open the customize menu (this is customisable in the normal Minecraft keybind settings).</sub>

![Edit Crosshair Keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o1tyE5vJ/images/52418b3213eec307702c5657b361d09afc2f68e0.png)

## NEW FEATURE: Draw your own crosshair!

![Custom drawn crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o1tyE5vJ/images/73aba3c4758c1eeeed3127f1d15de853e1f388f9.png)


[![Become a Patron!](https://i.imgur.com/EoTTpxb.png)](https://www.patreon.com/bePatron?u=66431720)

<sub>Please consider supporting this mod!</sub>

<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" src="https://youtube.com/embed/sazXJH7Bpv0" width="638" height="358"></iframe>


![Custom crosshair mod](http://i.imgur.com/QZGHHqU.png)
